nasb.text: Now Dinah the daughter of Leah, whom she had borne to Jacob, went out to visit the daughters of the land.

esv.text: Now Dinah the daughter of Leah, whom she had borne to Jacob, went out to see the women of the land.

cnv.text: 利亞給雅各所生的女兒底拿，出去要看看當地的女子。

ccb.text: 一天，利亚给雅各所生的女儿底娜到外面去见当地的女子。

csbs.text: 莉亚为雅各所生的女儿狄娜出去，要见识那地的女子。
